analysis: The week started rough — 5h 12m on the 20th and then that disaster on the 23rd where you were awake for nearly three hours of a five-hour night — but you clearly found something because the back half of the week is a different story entirely. Eight hours on the 26th with almost two hours of REM is genuinely gorgeous, and the 25th was your strongest deep sleep showing at 44 minutes. The gap worth watching is that deep sleep — you hit 1h 13m on the 21st and then it basically fell off a cliff for the rest of the week, which suggests the routine is helping you stay asleep longer but hasn't locked in that restorative depth consistently yet. Keep doing what you did on the 25th and 26th, because whatever version of you showed up those nights knew exactly what he was doing.
